Tolan's Darkwood Greaves  
 

Lore Item
Slot: LEGS
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 24
STR: +8 DEX: +8 WIS: +8 AGI: +8
Effect: Cancel Magic (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 10.0) at Level 45
WT: 7.5 Size: LARGE
Class: RNG
Race: ALL except IKS VAH FRG
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Slot: LEGS
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 24

i got mine for 15k

saw someone auction a pair for 6k and by the time i sent my tell to him they were gone...poof

i dont know aobut u but in 10sec i can sit down and mem a a spell and start casting it and probably finish. with a 10 sec cast time i would say the effect is useless(unless u are a joker. IE see other post)

QuoteReply
# Sep 02 2002 at 2:40 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759368833
70 posts
i got mine the other night and i must say they rox. great stats(some of the best as kunark armor goes) good ac(as rangers go) but the effect, come on plz VI make it somin good. i would be happy if i could right click this and make food that would be cooler then cancel magic. all this effect leads to is "i proced my pants jokes"..

SWEET
QuoteReply
# May 16 2002 at 2:03 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758578638
189 posts
Man these greaves are AWESOME, I just wish they had a better effect... *sigh*
Well I hope I get some one day *dreams*
Tazain Blackmontain <Dragoons Of Armageddon>
Tunare's ranger of lvl 28
Torvonnilous
▲ Page top
RE: SWEET
QuoteReply
# Jul 10 2002 at 4:52 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591770260749
Scholar
104 posts
Well thereare better effects out there, but I have one thing to say about this effect that is very nice. Removing damage shields from mobs. Dosent seem like much, but when you get to the big boys that have some decent damage shields, this is nice to have as an effect and not use up a spell slot for it. Pull with it, or let your tank beat on it for a minute while you hit the mob with this, then jump in with the rest of the melees. Dropping a damage shield (not a 1pt ds, etc) can save a half a bub on ten tanks tanking a mob on a raid, or 1 whole person worth of health.

Safe Travels
▲ Page top
RE: SWEET
QuoteReply
# Jun 11 2002 at 1:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757204608
44 posts
While there are certainly better effects out there, cancel magic as a clickable effect is quite handy because (as with all clickables) it saves that spell gem slot. Sometimes it's necessary in a battle, but at that point it's a ridiculous bother and could be dangerous for your group if you have to stop fighting to hunt for it in your spellbook.

I for one hate having to keep cancel magic up for those here-and-there mobs that require dispelling. These greaves are lovely on their own, and CM is a handy bonus. But that's just my little opinion. ;-)
▲ Page top
RE: SWEET
QuoteReply
# Aug 27 2002 at 1:01 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770675717
79 posts
on a PvP server these rock.
alot of times PKers come for u during or right after a mob is dead, yer low on mana and 9 times out of 10, u dont have dispell up. wiping someones SoW or buffs while they trying to kill you is great =D, now i just need to get some for myself (and they beat the heck out of kromrif millitary legs )

Info
QuoteReply
# Feb 10 2002 at 10:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591769558193
61 posts
Just thougth ide be one of the few ppl who posted useful info instead of junk (ie VS is as hardas trak and BS)

these legs r abt 15-30k depending on server now

The bp is abt 35k-40k

VS is no where near trak NO where even close at all

VS is a P*ssy. He can eb done easily with 10-12ppl if they know what there doing now u can stick 30 idiots in his lair and die before VS is even at 80%
Trak takes a big raid to do not as big as ToV stuff but larger then arena keal some where in between

anyways hope this info helps

Tagian Linoroxx
54th Pathfinder

Yamabushi Clan
The Rathe

i know the original post is somewhat old, but id just like to update on the VS situation. VS as he said is a complete p*ssy. But yea he's very weak and 1 group is sufficient enough to do him.

These are more than the bp because these drop off a harder mob than what the bp drops off of, its all about the rarity and hardness of getting stuff

▲ Page top
RE: Why does it cost so much?
QuoteReply
# Oct 08 2001 at 11:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756999176
61 posts
Umm the real Venril Sathir (not the one for the epic) is about as tough as Trakanon. HE lifetaps for some insane amount of damage(enough to kill my 48 ranger in one shot, if he is unbuffed), and casts it ever few seconds. Not as good as a complete heal but also destories the unlucky ******* who has him agro'ed. For the kill it is worth that much.
Beside ranger leggings that have that much AC are few and far between.
▲ Page top
RE: Why does it cost so much?

▲ Page top
RE: Why does it cost so much?
QuoteReply
# Oct 26 2001 at 9:40 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758540697
1 post
he isn't nearly as tough as trakanon...or else trak is easy as hell. needed: 58+ warrior to be main tank/agro, some chanter to chain rune on him so VS' LT doesn't land. when main tank has all the agro a bunch of melees (first time i went in I was a 34 ranger lol) come in and hit him in the back so they don't get riposted. all the while any healer classes are healing the main tank, when VS is about 30-40 health all nukers nuke the hell out of him. VS went down in about 2 mins, dropped gnarled staff, shammy legs and cleric legs.
▲ Page top
RE: Why does it cost so much?
QuoteReply
# Jan 28 2002 at 2:45 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247597247
Scholar
33 posts
I was told his lifeproc is an AE spell. which makes all the difference. is it single target or area effect?
▲ Page top
RE: Why does it cost so much?
QuoteReply
# Feb 26 2002 at 10:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965992705
2 posts
It is single target.
▲ Page top
RE: Why does it cost so much?
QuoteReply
# Jul 31 2002 at 4:11 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591774066779
Scholar
103 posts
He uses the same type (area wise i mean) as Maestro in Hate does, it's a cone shape, Hitting everyone in a 4-5ft radius in front of him, so MAKE SURE the enchanter(s) you have on the chain-rune detail AREN'T standing right next to the MA. I saw a friends VS Raid wipe 3 times cause idgit chanters/clerics were sitting in the lifetap range and went down after 2-3 taps hit them. /sigh

Wolveran Shadowbane 54/1 Pathfinder (1 friggin yellow til Outrider)
Shizadow Knizight 34 Shadowknight
▲ Page top
RE: Why does it cost so much?
QuoteReply
# May 28 2002 at 3:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591751973730
21 posts
It's AE. All the melee were standing in the back because his LT hits everyone he is facing.

# Feb 26 2002 at 9:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770260749
Scholar
104 posts
It is a clickable effect. Target yourself to use on yourself, target someone else to use on them, target a mob to use on... Well, you get the idea. ;)

Safe Travels
